pricingPage.title: Go live in minutes. Scale as conversations grow.
pricingPage.subtitle: Starter, Growth, and Scale include the same core product. Choose the monthly software subscription that fits your team, with a monthly usage allowance included in every plan.
pricingPage.trialInlineText: Start your 14-day free trial. No card required.
planIncludedFeatures: Shared inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, and Telegram
Team assignment and human handover flow

notes: The plan fee includes software subscription and a monthly usage allowance.

enterpriseCard.title: Custom Plan
